title: Product Promo · 30s
summary: Multi-scene 30-second product promo: problem-type intro, brand reveal, benefits flowchart, product surfaces, value pillars, foundation, CTA outro. Forked from Nate Herk's hyperframes-student-kit (linear-promo-30s); brand-specific copy + assets replaced with generic placeholders.
